---
name: nezam-testing-automation
description: Deterministic testing automation workflow for unit, E2E, and visual coverage with `/SCAN tests` integration.
version: 1.0.0
updated: 2026-05-08
changelog: []
---

# Purpose
Automate testing setup and verification for consistent quality gates across `/DEVELOP` -> `/SCAN tests` -> `/FIX tests` -> `/SAVE`.

# Inputs
- `docs/workspace/plans/INDEX.md` and relevant `docs/workspace/plans/*/TASKS.md` entries.
- Existing test config files (`package.json`, Jest/Vitest/Playwright configs, if present).
- Source tree and CI workflow files under `.github/workflows/`.

# Step-by-Step Workflow
1. Read `docs/workspace/plans/INDEX.md` to identify the active phase and required test scope.
2. Inventory current test tooling by checking existing config files and scripts in `package.json`.
3. If missing, scaffold baseline test configuration:
   - Unit/integration runner config (Jest or Vitest).
   - E2E config (`playwright.config.*`) with stable retry and trace defaults.
   - Coverage script entries in `package.json` (`test`, `test:unit`, `test:e2e`, `test:coverage`).
4. Add deterministic mocking patterns for network/time/external APIs to reduce flakiness.
5. Define coverage thresholds and fail-fast behavior in test config (global plus critical-path overrides).
6. Run verification commands in order:
   - `npm run test:unit`
   - `npm run test:e2e`
   - `npm run test:coverage`
7. Map failures to `/SCAN tests` categories (unit, E2E, visual, infra).
8. Route actionable failures to `/FIX tests` with minimal patch scope and rerun loop.
9. Persist outcomes using `/SAVE log` with pass/fail evidence and residual test debt.

# Validation & Metrics
- Unit coverage floor meets or exceeds agreed threshold (default target: >= 80% statements and branches).
- E2E critical-path suite passes with stable retries (no flaky rerun dependence).
- Visual baselines produce deterministic diffs (no random rendering noise).
- CI test pass rate trend remains healthy (target: >= 95% over recent runs).

# Output Format
- Updated test config files and `package.json` scripts.
- Coverage threshold settings with explicit rationale.
- Test run summary including pass/fail counts and flaky test inventory.
- `/SCAN tests` to `/FIX tests` triage handoff list.

# Integration Hooks
- Triggered by `/SCAN tests` for automated triage.
- Feeds `/FIX tests` with categorized remediation tasks.
- Completes with `/SAVE log` evidence for hardening and release readiness.
- CI hook: required PR checks for unit, E2E, and coverage jobs.

# Anti-Patterns
- Running only local happy-path tests without CI parity.
- Flaky tests caused by uncontrolled timers/network state.
- Coverage targets bypassed or disabled to force green builds.
- Visual snapshots updated without human review context.

# External Reference
- [GitHub Actions docs](https://docs.github.com/actions)
- [Playwright docs](https://playwright.dev/docs/intro)
- [Jest docs](https://jestjs.io/docs/getting-started)
- [Vitest docs](https://vitest.dev/guide/)
